display.purpose: Hero statements and large printshop signal words.

body.purpose: Service descriptions, specs, and contact guidance.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Simple hover, focus, and menu state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main project inquiry action on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff00c7; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #ff00c7; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 30px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #fff; color: #000; border-color: #fff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #fff500; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Dark Input
components.description: Transparent contact field on black/footer imagery.
components.css: .ds-input-dark { height: 50px; border: 1px solid #fff; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: #fff; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; } .ds-input-dark::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,.78); } .ds-input-dark:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #00d1ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: CMY Color Bar
components.css: .ds-cmy { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 3px; } .ds-cmy span:nth-child(1) { flex: 1; background: #00d1ff; } .ds-cmy span:nth-child(2) { flex: 1; background: #ff00c7; } .ds-cmy span:nth-child(3) { flex: 1; background: #fff500; }

narrative.overview: The Point design system is built from production graphics: black fields, white type, sharp CMY accents, and real work imagery. It should feel direct and made, not airy or decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Black and white dominate the experience.
Cyan, magenta, and yellow appear as decisive print accents.
Headlines are heavy, compact, and direct.
Photography shows finished signage, print pieces, and installation work.

rules.name: The CMY Signal Rule
rules.body: Cyan, magenta, and yellow must feel like printshop identity, not random decoration.

rules.name: The Black Field Rule
rules.body: Hero and footer experiences stay dark. Do not turn the site into a pale brochure.

rules.name: The Flat Print Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat unless a modal overlay requires depth. No decorative card shadows.

dos: Do keep black, white, cyan, magenta, and yellow as the identity core.
Do use real work imagery for products, services, and portfolio proof.
Do keep form interactions direct, with clear success and error states.
donts: Don't make this look like a generic SaaS landing page.
Don't use soft pastel startup visuals.
Don't add heavy glassmorphism or decorative shadows.
Don't replace the printshop identity with stock-photo brochure sameness.
